nasb.text: “Go and say to My servant David, ‘Thus says the Lord, “Are you the one who should build Me a house to dwell in?

esv.text: “Go and tell my servant David, ‘Thus says the Lord: Would you build me a house to dwell in?

cnv.text: “你去對我的僕人大衛說：耶和華這樣說：‘你要建造一座殿宇給我居住嗎？

ccb.text: “你去告诉我的仆人大卫，‘耶和华说，你岂是为我建造殿宇的人？
